title: TagCompact
description: A *tag* is a label that can be attached to any task in Asana. It exists in a single workspace or organization.

gid.description: Globally unique identifier of the resource, as a string.

resource_type.description: The base type of this resource.

name.description: Name of the tag. This is generally a short sentence fragment that fits on a line in the UI for maximum readability. However, it can be longer.
